text: Each fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas mobility fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.058 — Disposition of Fees

Each fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas mobility fund.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1325, Sec. 11.01, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: Each fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas mobility fund.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1325, Sec. 11.01, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
